name: Vegetable Finger Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Press out in one piece without separation 2 packages Pillsbury Crescent Rolls on a jelly roll pan or cookie sheet with edge.
2. Bake as directed on the Crescent Roll package and cool.
3. Mix together 8 oz Cream cheese, 1 cup Mayonnaise, and 1 package Hidden Valley Ranch Dressing.
4. Spread the mixture evenly on the cooled baked rolls.
5. Mix together 1/2 cup chopped green pepper, 1/2 cup chopped carrots, 1/2 cup chopped broccoli, and press into the cream cheese mixture.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
7. Cut into small squares.
8. Store in the refrigerator for several days.
